character_face_visibility.KENICHI_MAIN: front face visible; thoughtful expression; eyes gazing downward
character_face_visibility.ISHIKAWA_DETECTIVE: profile face visible; furrowed brow; eyes scanning room
character_face_visibility.MISAKI_FEMALE: three-quarter face visible; alert eyes; subtle tension in features
character_face_visibility.AYAKA_VICTIM: front face visible on corpse; pale and still; no eye line

shot_spine.first_frame_goal: 酒店套房内清晨光线照亮凌乱床铺，彩花尸体丝巾勒颈肩带滑落，健一站立摸领带若有所思
shot_spine.continuity_out: 淡出至健一疑问钩子：小樱是谁？为什么彩花要守护她？
shot_spine.split_notes: 单一镜头浓缩全集事实为开场建立，焦点钩子疑问无多任务冲突
